biological_replicate: Embryos were obtained from female mice of CD1 IGS mouse strain
technical_replicate: PCR was done according to the manufacturer’s protocol
experimental_design: Analysis of either complete or conditional HbChP Wnt5a knock-out (Wnt5aKO or Wnt5acKO) embryos
factor_value: Analysis of either complete or conditional HbChP Wnt5a knock-out (Wnt5aKO or Wnt5acKO) embryos
number_of_fractions: we performed discontinuous gradient ultracentrifugation of HbChP-derived primary culture supernatants
